tweets.quoted_tweet_text: Bitcoin found some short-term support around $61,000. That's slightly above the February low of just under $60,000. It makes sense that there would be some initial support there. So far it's bounced over $2,000 off that low. Let's see how long it lasts.

tweets.text: The government claims the U.S. added 172K jobs in May, twice expectations. Unfortunately, all of those jobs were either in leisure and hospitality, or in government or government-related services. That drives demand for imported goods, increasing trade deficits and goods prices.
